title: Team Leave Manager API
description:
A RESTful API built with **FastAPI** for managing team leave records.

---

### Quick Start

Visit `/docs` for the interactive Swagger UI, or `/redoc` for the ReDoc documentation.

openapi_tags.name: Root
openapi_tags.description: Health check and entry point for the API.

openapi_tags.name: Create New Record
openapi_tags.description:
Add a new leave record for a team member.

**Required fields:**

| Field | Type | Example | Notes |
|-------|------|---------|-------|
| `emp_name` | `string` | `"John"` | Employee name |
| `date` | `string` | `"2025-12-31"` | Format: `YYYY-MM-DD` |
| `time` | `string` | `"AM"` | Must be `AM` or `PM` |
| `reason` | `string` | `"Medical"` | Optional |

openapi_tags.name: Change Record from Valid to Invalid
openapi_tags.description:
Soft-delete a leave record by marking it as **invalid**.

Provide the identifying fields of the record you wish to invalidate. This operation is non-destructive — the record remains in the database but will no longer appear in active queries.

openapi_tags.name: Retrieve All Valid Records
openapi_tags.description:
Fetch all currently **valid** leave records.

Results are sorted in the following order:
1. `date` — ascending
2. `time` — AM before PM
3. `emp_name` — alphabetically
